markdownRemark.html:
在项目中设置eslint,prettier和editorconfig

ESLint

使用eslint-config-7xn共享配置。
首先，使用如下命令安装eslint-config-7xn,ESLint等相关依赖

npm install --save-dev eslint-config-7xn eslint-plugin-compat@3.x eslint-config-prettier@6.x @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin@1.x @typescript-eslint/parser@1.x babel-eslint@10.x eslint@6.x eslint-plugin-flowtype@3.x eslint-plugin-import@2.x eslint-plugin-jsx-a11y@6.x eslint-plugin-react@7.x eslint-plugin-react-hooks@1.x

然后在项目根目录新建.eslintrc文件，内容如下

{
  "extends": "7xn"
}

script

在package.json添加如下内容

"scripts": {
  "lint": "eslint .",
  "lint:fix": "eslint . --fix"
},

现在你可以运行npm run lint检查代码并可以npm run lint:fix修复

VS Code

当然，或许你也希望你的编辑器可以检测eslint错误并修复，以VS Code为例。
先安装扩展VS Code ESLint extension

Prettier

ESLint和Prettier配合使用 由于eslint-config-7xn已经使用eslint-config-prettier把可能冲突的规则关掉，所以不需要再.eslintrc文件添加配置。 在项目根目录新建文件.prettierrc文件，添加如下内容

{
  "singleQuote": true,
  "trailingComma": "es5",
  "printWidth": 100,
  "overrides": [
    {
      "files": ".prettierrc",
      "options": { "parser": "json" }
    }
  ]
}

同样的道理，也可以在package.json添加格式化代码命令

script

"scripts": {
  "prettier": "prettier --write .",
},

VS Code

安装扩展Prettier formatter for Visual Studio Code

Editorconfig

EditorConfig helps maintain consistent coding styles for multiple developers working on the same project across various editors and IDEs. The EditorConfig project consists of a file format for defining coding styles and a collection of text editor plugins that enable editors to read the file format and adhere to defined styles. EditorConfig files are easily readable and they work nicely with version control systems.

Example file 在项目根目录新建文件.editorconfig

# http://editorconfig.org
root = true

[*]
indent_style = space
indent_size = 2
end_of_line = lf
charset = utf-8
trim_trailing_whitespace = true
insert_final_newline = true

[*.md]
trim_trailing_whitespace = false

[Makefile]
indent_style = tab

VS Code安装插件EditorConfig for Visual Studio Code
